RULING:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. Counsel presented a stipulation re: settlement to the Court. The Court took DEFENDANT DAVID DENEBEIM'S DEMURRER COMPLAINT off calendar. Stipulation and order signed in open court. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
